name: Apple-Cheddar Crescent
recipeIngredient: 6 Apples (3 Granny Smith and 3 Red Delicious)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Lightly coat a baking sheet with vegetable oil spray.
3. On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough into a 12-inch circle.
4. Melt the apple spread in the microwave (10 - 15 seconds on high).
5. Brush the melted spread onto the pie crust with a pastry brush.
6. Peel the apples if desired and chop them coarsely.
7. Scatter the chopped apples over the pie crust, then scatter the shredded cheddar cheese.
8. Using a pizza cutter, cut the pie crust into 8 wedges.
9. Starting from the wide end, roll up each wedge of crust.
10. Place the wedges on the prepared baking sheet and shape them into crescents.
11. Brush with melted butter.
12. Bake for about 15 minutes, until browned and bubbly.
